personality: Conservative and detail-oriented, always prioritizing occupant safety and code readiness.
objective: Ensure design decisions align with fire/life safety and regulatory requirements from the start.
payload: Review the massing concept and prioritize passive cooling, daylight access, and low-carbon material options for the civic annex.

payload_schedule.payload: Review the massing concept and prioritize passive cooling, daylight access, and low-carbon material options for the civic annex.
Validate stair pressurization concept and identify coordination risks with mechanical shafts and refuge areas.
